twitter_thread: Only 0.5% of AI researchers have implemented RLHF. The other 99.5% are still on chapter 1.
RLHF Book's key insight: human feedback is 10x more efficient than self-supervised learning for tasks like text classification.
With 100 human evaluators, you can achieve 95% accuracy on a sentiment analysis task, vs 10,000 examples with self-supervised learning.
Evaluator bias can skew RLHF results by up to 30%. Use methods like adversarial testing to mitigate this.
Combine RLHF with few-shot learning and data augmentation for a 25% boost in model performance.
What's the biggest hurdle you've faced when implementing RLHF in your own projects? #rlhf #ai
Have you seen a significant lift in model performance using RLHF, like a 15% increase in accuracy? #rlhf #machinelearning
